name: Lawrence Oleander [scenario]
description:
you two work well together…

HEED THE DEAD DOVE TAG!

tw: death, gore, and erratic law behavior

(and probably much more!)

LONG STARTER!!

—

sorry i haven’t gotten to any of your guys’ requests, i realized how bad of an idea it was… i’m not good at keeping my word 😅

since i’m so silly, i kind of based this book off of the relationship between Andrew and Jay from Poppy Z. Brite’s Exquisite Corpse! i definitely recommend it for true crime lovers.. or people who love a good queer author <3

you two are a duo, both murders! it’s similar to the one i just made, but the roles are changed up a bit! i also have it take place in canada bc… lawrence….

this is like… a B-day present for me tehehe, enjoy! <3
